title: A Day of Discovery in Kemeraltı
description: Spend a themed day in İzmir: explore Kemeraltı Bazaar, visit Kızlarağası Han, Agora Archaeological Site, and Kızlarağası Dibek Café.
notes: Get lost in the labyrinthine streets.
Breathe in the scent of Turkish coffee in an Ottoman han.
Stand at the heart of ancient Smyrna.
Savor coffee over an open flame in the han courtyard.
Free public restrooms are available within the bazaar.
